title: You cannot use this map in local game or on other servers except NO HESI

messages.content: # Here is how to fix “ You cannot use this map in local game or on other servers except NO HESI “

## Method 1
> Follow our FAQ on how to install tracks manually linked here: <#1457475437809631416>

## Method 2
> If the steps above didn't work, Open Windows settings>Time & language>Date & Time> make sure that the both settings are enabled, after that press on the "sync now" button.
